purpose: Durable P13 aiflow queue for Kitex and go-zero gap closure, keeping .aiflow runtime state ignored while making the active governance plan machine-checkable.

aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/regression-report.json, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P13 tasks are submitted to ignored local aiflow runtime state and mirrored here as durable docs/reference evidence; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

tasks.title: RPC Tier 1 promotion closeout
tasks.objective: Move unary and stream RPC evidence from candidate or report-only toward Tier 1 promotion criteria without overstating latency parity.
tasks.deliverable: Release-train evidence for unary, server-stream, client-stream, bidi-stream, resolver, balancer, deadline, retry, auth, tracing, Kitex coexistence, rollback, and allocation-blocking promotion decisions.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC promotion evidence and both rpc-boundary-check and bench-regression-check pass; latency remains report-only unless evidence is strong enough for blocking promotion

tasks.title: goctl generator maturity
tasks.objective: Raise generator trust toward goctl-level maturity across .api import, format, validation, historical fixtures, adopter replay, and classified diffs.
tasks.deliverable: .api compatibility rows, old/current/future fixtures, real adopter branch replay, multi-language client planning, temporary project go test evidence, and repeat-generation diff classification.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after generator compatibility and upgrade dry-run gates pass with explainable repeated generation diffs

tasks.title: REST binding validation envelope
tasks.objective: Deepen REST path, query, header, body, tag, schema, and error-code consistency between runtime binding and OpenAPI contracts.
tasks.deliverable: Golden coverage for binding and schema surfaces, validator adapter evidence, invalid request smoke, and stable rest.ErrorResponse behavior.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after OpenAPI validation gate passes and invalid requests return a stable rest.ErrorResponse

tasks.title: go-zero resilience defaults
tasks.objective: Align default resilience capabilities with go-zero style production expectations across REST, RPC, and Gateway paths.
tasks.deliverable: Unified configuration and runtime evidence for timeout, concurrency limit, rate limit, breaker, adaptive shedding, retry, enable/disable paths, invalid configuration, and downgrade behavior.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after resilience matrix evidence and drill check pass with runtime behavior, not only governance rule documentation

tasks.title: DB and cache productization
tasks.objective: Productize data access and cache workflows so generated services have credible SQL and Redis/cache adoption paths.
tasks.deliverable: SQL repository templates, transaction samples, pagination, optimistic locking, read/write routing strategy, Redis cache-aside templates, cache observability, and generated service DB/cache smoke evidence.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after DB/cache productization gate passes and cache hot path can move from unsupported-report-only toward candidate evidence

tasks.title: Gateway and cache benchmark evidence
tasks.objective: Close unsupported-report-only benchmark gaps for gateway proxy and cache hot path surfaces.
tasks.deliverable: BenchmarkGatewayProxy, BenchmarkCacheHotPath, five baseline samples, three current trend samples, allocation budgets, latency report-only policy, and rollback notes.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark evidence and bench-regression-check pass; only allocations become blocking until latency trend evidence is stronger

tasks.title: Discovery adapter failover matrix
tasks.objective: Move discovery from abstraction evidence to adapter and failover behavior evidence across common registries.
tasks.deliverable: Adapter matrix for etcd, Consul, Nacos, Kubernetes, DNS, and static providers with watch, lease, zone/tag/version filtering, failover, stale endpoint, unavailable registry, resolver update, and rollback notes.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after discovery adapter matrix gate passes with failover and rollback evidence

tasks.title: Reference app live proof
tasks.objective: Turn production-orders into a real production topology proof with memory and Docker-backed modes.
tasks.deliverable: Memory mode and Docker-backed profiles for SQL outbox, Redis cache, Kafka/RabbitMQ/Redis Stream, Consul/etcd/Nacos discovery, OTel collector, and explicit fallback evidence when local tools are unavailable.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after reference-app-smoke passes in memory mode and Docker-backed behavior is live or explicitly skipped with auditable fallback evidence

tasks.title: Migration case upgrade
tasks.objective: Upgrade Kitex, go-zero, Gin, and Kratos migration proof into runnable adopter decision evidence.
tasks.deliverable: Runnable Kitex coexistence, go-zero .api migration, Gin REST migration, and Kratos app migration cases, each with rollback notes, compatibility caveats, and gate commands.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after adopter decision and examples smoke gates pass

tasks.title: Plugin and template publish hardening
tasks.objective: Harden plugin registry and template publishing from example-level assets into a publishable protocol contract.
tasks.deliverable: Registry manifest, digest and signature checks, source allowlist, least-privilege permissions, template contract versioning, malicious path coverage, and partial-write rollback evidence.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin conformance gate passes across old/current/future protocol, digest mismatch, permission escape, malicious path, and no partial writes

tasks.title: CLI doctor troubleshooting loop
tasks.objective: Close the adopter failure loop so CI and agent-facing commands explain the next action after failure.
tasks.deliverable: gofly doctor --json, gofly release check --json, generated project failure report, support bundle, nextActions, and CLI JSON golden coverage.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after CLI JSON golden coverage and troubleshooting governance gates pass

tasks.title: Hosted release supply-chain closure
tasks.objective: Close hosted tag-release supply-chain evidence so release artifacts are auditable and cannot bypass artifact gates.
tasks.deliverable: Tag CI artifact proof for SBOM, checksums, provenance, Docker digest, Trivy, release evidence manifest, and non-skippable release artifact gates.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after required-check drift and governance report gates pass with hosted release artifact proof mapped into the dashboard
